TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tomiyac ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 168 buwan, 404 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 354 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 81%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tomiyac hya' ga Sa'aniwan. tay mkyahu' na Tomiyac hya' ga Dadowacen. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tomijaʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tomijaʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaʔaniwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na tomijaʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa *a*owaʦ~ʨen. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tomiyac ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 168 buwan, 404 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 354 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 81%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tomiyac hya' ga Sa'aniwan. tay mkyahu' na Tomiyac hya' ga Dadowacen. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tomijaʦ~ʨ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tomijaʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaʔaniwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na tomijaʦ~ʨ ħjaʔ ɣa *a*owaʦ~ʨen. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
